generic_rules: Focus repairs on resolving AGREE syntax and type errors without altering the underlying AADL architecture.
Prioritize fixing unresolved identifiers or invalid helper declarations when AGREE reports type errors.
Ensure AGREE contracts are contained within `annex agree { ... };` blocks.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use only visible AADL features or helper declarations within the same annex.
Ensure helper declarations match the expected expression types (e.g., bool for comparisons, int for integer operations).
anti_patterns: Avoid adding new AADL architecture to resolve AGREE errors; focus on fixing contract syntax or references.
Do not introduce package-qualified identifiers not present in the model dependencies.
